name: maaaw-kit-marketplace
description: MaaawKit: production engineering skills, safety hooks, specialist agents, first-class project memory, and a cross-agent orchestration bridge for Claude Code

plugins.name: maaaw-kit
plugins.description: The core kit: engineering skills (.NET/PowerShell/TS/Python), safety+quality+loop hooks (zero-install node shims), swarm auditor agents with findings contracts, first-class project memory, and chained workflow commands

plugins.name: maaaw-bridge
plugins.description: The orchestration layer: /bridge job control over Codex/Gemini/Cursor/Copilot/opencode, /cross-review second-model reviews, universal agent handoff, and one-source rules sync. Pairs with the maaawkit npm engine
